blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot automate native OS file picker dialogs through agent-browser - tool limitation
Test media file (32KB) encodes in under 1 second - cannot observe progress bar updates
Test media file (32KB) encodes too fast to test cancel functionality - need larger test file

rootCause.description: Round 3 validation could not be performed - Electron app runs but React UI does not render in agent-browser context. The Electron window opens, window.electronAPI is intermittently defined, but the React app never renders into the DOM (body is always empty). This appears to be an environment-specific issue preventing browser-based validation.
details: Unit tests pass (246 tests) - core functionality is validated
Electron app starts successfully with --dev flag
Vite dev server runs on port 5173
window.electronAPI is sometimes accessible (returns 'object' type) but React app doesn't render
Browser DOM shows <head></head><body></body> - React root div never populated
This is a different issue from round 2 (where React rendered but didn't sync state)
rootCause.suggestedFix: Environment issue - Electron app may need to be run in a different mode or environment for browser-based testing. Alternatively, investigate why React doesn't render when connected via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol) - possibly a sandbox or context issue.
